reviews.review_description: I got banned for steam but I don't use steam.. Good while it lasted I guess.

This is a game i really recommend for now and new players, this game offers, cool movement and cosmetics you can buy, this game gets you free long arms, the owner is super nice and helpful for me and probably will be for you too, the staff are super nice to you if you need anything, they will help you with it, ban appeals are in the discord in case you get banned falsely, basically all I have to say go down with this game. I totally recommend it. Im JellyVR￼

reviews.review_title: No way to appeal a ban.
reviews.review_description: My son was accused of saying a word he doesn’t even know.  I supervise him while playing.  One person reported him say a bad word and without verification of the offense. I know for a fact my son never used the word he was accused of and it is sad you can’t appeal. I would avoid this game and not spend money because you will lose everything if one person gets mad at you.

reviews.review_title: Active Player with a Lot of Respect for
reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this fan game for a good while now, and it’s honestly solid. It’s not perfect, but you can tell the devs put real effort into it. The community has its ups and downs like any game, but I still enjoy hopping on and helping people out when I can. I’ve reported bugs, given feedback, and just tried to keep things fun and fair. It’s cool to see the game grow, and I’d definitely be down to play a bigger role in that. Props to the devs for keeping it going.
